# IOHIDElementCommitDirection

**Enumeration**

The commit direction for an HID element.

## Declaration

```swift
typedef enum { ... } IOHIDElementCommitDirection;
```

## Overview

Passing a value of [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElementCommitDirection/kIOHIDElementCommitDirectionOut] issues a [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDDevice/setReport] call to the device. Before issuing this call, set your desired value on the element with the [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement/setValue] or [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement/setDataValue] functions.

## Getting the Commit Directions

- **kIOHIDElementCommitDirectionIn**: Causes the retrieval of information from the device, and the populating of the element with the resulting data.
- **kIOHIDElementCommitDirectionOut**: Causes the element data to be sent to the device.

## Committing Changes to Elements

- **commit**: Commits the element value to and from the device.
